feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: AL's Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Lounananana

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,194Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Albert is back in L.A., and he’s just met an absolute angel of a firefighter—cute, gorgeous, kind, and hot. “An angel from the 105?” Chimney says. “Let me ask probie—he just pulled a shift over there.”  Meanwhile, Ravi can’t seem to shake a certain flirtatious playboy. No matter where he goes, it’s like the guy is haunting him.All he knows is that the guy's name is AL.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: these bad omens, I look right through them (it’s what you do when you love somebody)
entry.summary:
Author: NicoDiAngelo2point0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 571Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ Eddie, who had a place for Buck’s shoes in his house and a carton of oat milk with Buck’s name in sharpie whenever it had been brought home from a shopping trip. Buck’s name, which had always been crossed out because they were family and Buck had insisted on sharing everything.   Oh Eddie.   If he could see Buck now.   The man who had worked his ass off his whole life, and continued to work even harder just to make Buck’s life a little easier.   And look at what Buck had done. ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ An alternate take on the Buck drug abuse storyline with the most major change of Bobby being alive

entry.title: S6 Superwoman: Last Responder
entry.summary:
Author: That_bitch_without_a_life

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,902Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 24

Summary: For the past few months everything has been hectic and a little off balance. For some reason Bobby keeps putting her in different shift groups. It’s nice to be working with Ravi again now that he’s finished his probation and moved back to B-shift, but something is clearly up. With the return of the rest of the 118 things are starting to look up for Kara, but more importantly, new opportunity. TLDR: this is a female buck fic if she was supergirl, just trust the process.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,010Chapters: 6/365Kudos: 24

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: glen (derogatory)
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,413Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 78

Summary: The guy leans across the table to hand Buck the card and their fingers touch. Eddie's vision tunnels. It's — okay, it's not a touch touch. It's a brush. It's the kind of brush that happens any time two human beings transfer a small object, it is a purely functional hand-to-hand delivery of a business card, and the guy's wife, his lovely wife who Eddie is very grateful for, made the card herself, and Eddie knows all of this, and he’s being totally normal about it. Eddie yanks on the back of Buck's shirt without meaning to. Buck stumbles back a quarter-step. "I'm Buck, by the way." Buck recovers, tucks the card into his back pocket, sliding his arm around Eddie's waist. "This is my boyfriend, Eddie." Boyfriend. Eddie's whole body loosens another notch. "Oh, nice to meet you both." The guy sticks his hand out to shake. "I'm Glen." Or,Buck is Eddie's boyfriend and Eddie, for one, is over the moon about it.He's not so sure about this Glen guy, though. a pt. 2 for 'wikihow to be normal about your best friend'

entry.title: Animal Adaptations
entry.summary:
Author: UnlostDrarry

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,297Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 165

Summary: “Eddie, I promise you that no one is making any reports or trying to take your kid away, okay? I’ve seen bad and neglectful parents, I’ve heard kids talk about them, hell I’ve had them. You? You are the best dad, I knew that before you even walked into the room. Your kid loves you so much. That is not a sign of neglectful parenting. He talks about how cool your job is because you get to help people every day and that he loves living here in LA so much more than Texas. The only negative thing he’s talked about is your cooking-” Eddie sputtered, face heating in embarrassment as his face warmed. “We’ve all been there, man. What I’m saying though is that yes a mistake was made, but not on your part. You thought you were leaving your kid with a good person that you could trust. No one will fault you for that. What I can do is send you the security footage of the incident in case you wish to make a report, and we can go from there.” “I see why my kid claimed you as his best friend. You really have a way of talking to people, Buck.” Buck ducked his head, smiling bashfully, squeezing Eddie's shoulder once before releasing it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Picture imperfect
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,414Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: Pulling apart, Buck and Eddie turn to look down at the broken picture frame. A photo of Buck, Eddie and Chris lays morosely within the wreckage. "Uh, we should probably clean that up." Buck says hoarsely. "Yeah." Eddie agrees with a sigh and turns to look back at Buck. The sight of him has Eddie's breath catching, as he takes in Buck's flushed face, the sheen of saliva on his lips and his dark, hooded eyes. The heat momentarily extinguished by the broken photo frame flares back to life with a vengeance. "But it can wait until later." OR Buck and Eddie come home from a date and can't keep their hands to themselves.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: a thousand teeth (yours among them)
entry.summary:
Author: collieflower

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,475Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: “What was the plan?”Buck’s mouth drops open and snaps shut. “I didn’t have one.”“Bullshit. What were you gonna do? Let yourself get bit and pay your penance that way?” He crosses the distance between them before Buck’s brain kicks back online. Eddie’s hands curl into his collar, pushing him away before dragging him right back. Eddie’s teeth glint in the morning light. His canines look longer in the dawn. “Gonna take the easy way out and disappear on me? Make me look for you until I find you half-rotted, trying to get a taste?”  Or, divorce 3.0, zombie edition.

entry.title: You Are Not Alone, Believe Me
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,112Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 83

Summary: “Okay, um, what else? Obviously, there’s more information because you wouldn’t be telling me this. Can you please just—” The lawyer nods. “Daniela had two daughters, twins, born May 10th 2015. Alena and Adela Buckley.”“I—you—what? You’re saying that I have two daughters?”OrBuck gets the unexpected news that he’s a father to two twin girls and the lawyer may or may not think that Buck and Eddie are in a relationship.

entry.title: you belong with mii
entry.summary:
Author: lauriesamy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,144Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 353

Summary: “Does that say sweethearts?" Dad’s voice startles Chris from behind the couch, making him jump. “For me and Buck?” Chris dares to turn around and face him. He seems completely stunned, eyes wide open as he stares incredulously at the screen. “Yeah,” he replies with a swallow. “What—What does that mean?” Chris answers honestly. “It means you’re dating.” Dad furrows his brows. “What, why?” “You did that on your own,” Chris says. He does not mention that he changed Dad’s Mii’s dating options to include men as well, just to make this happen.OR: Too impatient to wait for them to get together in real life, Chris makes Buck and Eddie date in Tomodachi Life

entry.title: The Hermit, the Devil, and the Star
entry.summary:
Author: thetalee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 111,081Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 470

Summary: Buck is back at the 118, and Eddie's healed from the sniper, but that doesn't mean everything's rainbows and unicorns. He knows there's something wrong with Maddie, no matter how many times she and Chimney say everything's fine. He knows there's something wrong with Eddie, even if his boyfriend insists otherwise. At least everything seems to be okay with Daniel, this time.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,436Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 11

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love. The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath. He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt. So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence.It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth. ⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻ My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: Eddie Diaz's guide to a perfect Saturday morning
entry.summary:
Author: vinylsonthewall

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,784Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 135

Summary: "C'mere," Eddie mumbled and held out his arm for his son. "Come lay with us for a second." "Dad," Chris sighed, but Eddie heard his socked feet start to move toward the bed. "I'm way to old for this." Eddie smiled and cracked open an eye. "I know you are. Do it anyway."   Or, Eddie, Buck, Chris, and their baby share a quiet morning. Eddie has never been happier.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,655Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 96

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
